pageContext.name: Dennis Nedry meets the Dilophosaurus
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the latest from the Deluxe Art Scale 1:10 line - Dennis Nedry meets the Dilophosaurus!  From the film Jurassic Park, this Dennis Nedry meets the Dilophosaurus Statue is a limited edition, highly detailed, and hand-painted Jurassic Park collectible.  Jurassic Park fans, don't miss your chance to add the Dennis Nedry meets the Dilophosaurus 1:10 Statue to your Jurassic Park collection!
